untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'estimated fundamental value' and 'market resiliency indicator' which are not available in the allowed indicator list. Used price_pos_20 (20-period normalized price position, 0-1 scale) as proxy for deviation from range center, and hvol_20 (historical volatility) as proxy for market resiliency. True implementation requires custom fundamental value calculation and resiliency scoring not available in standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction implemented as dual entry logic: LONG when price near support (price_pos_20 < 0.02), SHORT when price near resistance (price_pos_20 > 0.98). Both require elevated hvol_20 (> 0.5, representing above-median resiliency). Exit triggers when price reverts toward center (price_pos_20 approaches 0.5) OR resiliency drops below 0.4 (40th percentile proxy). Deviation threshold mapped to price_pos_20 extremes; fundamental value and news filters cannot be implemented without custom data.
